nasb.text: May their eyes grow dim so that they cannot see, And make their loins shake continually.

esv.text: Let their eyes be darkened, so that they cannot see, and make their loins tremble continually.

cnv.text: 願他們的眼睛昏花，不能看見； 願他們的腰不停地戰抖。

ccb.text: 愿他们眼目昏暗，无法看见； 愿他们哆哆嗦嗦，直不起腰来。

csbs.text: 愿他们的眼睛变为昏暗，不能看见； 求你使他们的腰一直颤抖。
